ideation: This animation sequence simulates adjusting a necktie.  It starts with both arms down, then the right arm moves to adjust the tie, and finally returns to a neutral position.  The left arm remains largely still for contrast. The lack of elbows means we're emulating the action through shoulder movements.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm lifts to adjust the tie knot
fingers smooth the tie, a quick adjustment
right arm lowers, tie now perfectly straight
both arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
